commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So Ben-hadad hearkened unto king Asa, and sent the captains of his armies whom he had against the cities of Israel, and struck Ijon, and Dan, and Abel-beth-maacah, and all Cinneroth, with all the land of Naphtali. Ahion, or Ain, remote in the north, whence Theglathphalasar took away captives, (4 Kings xv. ) is perhaps the Enan of Ezechiel xlviii. , and Numbers xxxiv. In Paralipomenon, Abel-maim, "Abela of the waters "2 Kings xx. Ceneroth, near the sea of Tiberias, Josue xi. Benadad kept possession of some of these places, and even built streets in Samaria, chap.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
